companyNameJapanese: ステラケミファ株式会社
description: World leader in ultra-high-purity hydrofluoric acid (12-nine purity). Critical supplier for semiconductor etching and cleaning. Holds world top share in HF acid for semiconductors.

_externalRelationships.notes: Twelve-nine (99.9999999999%) purity HF. Only Stella and Morita Chemical can achieve this. Founded 1916.
